task_completion.description: Generate the CA, Server, and Client certificates with correct Common Names and SANs
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'openssl' commands generating certificates with CN='AcmeCorp Internal CA', CN='acme-gateway' (with SANs), and CN='acme-backend-client', or an 'ls' command showing the .crt and .key files in '~/projects/tls-setup/'.
Terminal showing the execution of 'docker network create acme-tls-net' or 'docker network ls' listing 'acme-tls-net'.

task_completion.description: Configure Nginx to require client certificate authentication
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (nano, vim) or terminal output (cat) showing an Nginx configuration file with directives like 'ssl_verify_client on;' and 'ssl_client_certificate' pointing to the CA.

task_completion.description: Deploy the Nginx container named 'acme-gateway' on the created network
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a 'docker run' command with '--name acme-gateway', '--network acme-tls-net', and port mapping for 443, or 'docker ps' showing the 'acme-gateway' container running.

task_completion.description: Verify the mTLS configuration and save output
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'curl' commands testing the HTTPS endpoint (both failing without a cert and succeeding with the client cert) and redirecting the successful output to '~/Desktop/tls_verification.txt', or a text editor showing the file contents.

task_completion.description: Provide PKI documentation detailing hierarchy and rotation strategy
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of '~/Desktop/pki_documentation.txt' with explanations of the certificate hierarchy and a rotation strategy.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used OpenSSL to generate the certificates
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal history should show actual 'openssl req', 'openssl x509', or 'openssl genrsa' commands rather than just creating empty files or copying existing ones.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Docker daemon
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal should show standard Docker CLI output for building/running containers and creating networks, not just mocked text files.

integrity.description: Verify the verification file contains actual curl output
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'tls_verification.txt' file should contain realistic HTTP response headers or HTML body from Nginx, rather than a manually typed sentence like 'Connection succeeded'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory: /home/ga/projects/tls-setup. CA Common Name: 'AcmeCorp Internal CA'. Server Certificate CN: 'acme-gateway' with SANs 'acme-gateway' and 'localhost'. Client Certificate CN: 'acme-backend-client'. Docker network: 'acme-tls-net'. Nginx container name: 'acme-gateway' on port 443. Verification output file: /home/ga/Desktop/tls_verification.txt. PKI documentation file: /home/ga/Desktop/pki_documentation.txt.
